text: A girl got a letter from an old pen pal. She read it under candlelight. It made her happy and reminisce about simpler times. She wrote back, painting pictures. She stayed in touch every quarter. Years went by quickly. They reminisced at reunions. She missed him. One day he visited. They cried. Laughed.
